'''hajocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearscape|fearscape]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearscape|fearscape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hajocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæjecheth|hæjecheth]] || [[word:hæjechej|hæjechej]] || [[word:hæjechesh|hæjechesh]] || [[word:hæjeche|hæjeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajojochoth|hajojochoth]] || [[word:hajojochoj|hajojochoj]] || [[word:hajojochosh|hajojochosh]] || [[word:hajojocho|hajojocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajochoth|hajochoth]] || [[word:hajochoj|hajochoj]] || [[word:hajochosh|hajochosh]] || [[word:hajocho|hajocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajofchoth|hajofchoth]] || [[word:hajofchoj|hajofchoj]] || [[word:hajofchosh|hajofchosh]] || [[word:hajofchof|hajofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hajochotho|hajochotho]] || [[word:hajochojo|hajochojo]] || [[word:hajochosho|hajochosho]] || [[word:hajochoko|hajochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hajochoth|hajochoth]] || [[word:hajochoj|hajochoj]] || [[word:hajochosh|hajochosh]] || [[word:hajocho|hajocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hajochothol|hajochothol]] || [[word:hajochojol|hajochojol]] || [[word:hajochoshol|hajochoshol]] || [[word:hajochokol|hajochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hajochothotho|hajochothotho]] || [[word:hajochojojo|hajochojojo]] || [[word:hajochoshosho|hajochoshosho]] || [[word:hajochoko|hajochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hajochothon|hajochothon]] || [[word:hajochojon|hajochojon]] || [[word:hajochoshon|hajochoshon]] || [[word:hajochokon|hajochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hajochothoro|hajochothoro]] || [[word:hajochojoro|hajochojoro]] || [[word:hajochoshoro|hajochoshoro]] || [[word:hajochokoro|hajochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
